form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming won by 1.3 len at Tauranga February 5 over 1200m in soft going defeating Poster Boy carrying 58kg at $4.80. Second-up didn't do much in the run home; 10th of 12 at Tauranga on March 14 over 1400m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Unwritten with 57.5kg at $20.30. Will need to do more.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 53 day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 7 at Matamata on February 14 over 1200m, in the wet; 4.5 len behind Scolera carrying 59kg at $4.60. The race before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Te Rapa on January 30 over 1200m, slow going 2.25 len behind Tale Of The Gypsy with 58kg at $2.80. Well placed. Well placed and sure to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of 11 weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Previously first up; sixth of 10 at Te Aroha December 7 over 1300m, 2.5 len behind Larius Lacus with 53.5kg at $9.10. This is an ideal race to kick off. A positive return to the track is anticipated.
